title: TypeScript compilation fails with MODULE_NOT_FOUND
evidence: npm run build fails: 'Cannot find module ../lib/tsc.js' at node_modules/.bin/tsc
suggestion: Reinstall node_modules or fix TypeScript installation. Tests pass via ts-jest, so source is valid; this appears to be an npm installation issue.

title: Cannot verify build succeeds in production
evidence: src/server.ts and dist/ compilation cannot be validated due to build failure
suggestion: Fix the TypeScript compiler issue to validate production builds.
